question: What is eBay Live?
expected_answer_hint: Livestream shopping platform in beta — buyers watch live video and purchase in real time

question: Is eBay Live available in Canada?
expected_answer_hint: No — US only

question: Do I need an eBay account to watch eBay Live?
expected_answer_hint: Yes — must be signed in with a US-registered account

question: What do I need to set up before I can bid?
expected_answer_hint: Payment and shipping details must be saved on the account

question: Can I cancel a bid after placing it?
expected_answer_hint: No — all bids are final and cannot be retracted

question: What happens if I win and change my mind?
expected_answer_hint: Cancellations for buyer's remorse are not allowed

question: How does the soft close rule work?
expected_answer_hint: If a bid is placed in the last 5 seconds the auction extends by 5 more seconds

question: How long do eBay Live auctions typically last?
expected_answer_hint: Usually under 2 minutes per item

question: What is max bidding?
expected_answer_hint: You set a maximum amount and eBay bids in increments on your behalf up to that limit

question: How will I know if I've been outbid?
expected_answer_hint: You receive an on-screen notification

question: What happens after I win an auction?
expected_answer_hint: You are automatically charged and receive an in-app notification and eBay inbox message

question: How do I become an eBay Live seller?
expected_answer_hint: Fill out the eBay Live Seller Interest Form — it is invite-only and in beta

question: Can any seller go live on eBay?
expected_answer_hint: No — requires good account standing and demonstrated category expertise

question: What selling formats are available on eBay Live?
expected_answer_hint: Real-time auction or fixed-price (Buy It Now)

question: What is a reserve price?
expected_answer_hint: Minimum price that protects the seller — item won't sell below it

question: Can I sell sneakers on eBay Live?
expected_answer_hint: No — only Collectibles and Luxury categories are supported

question: What collectibles are allowed on eBay Live?
expected_answer_hint: Sports trading cards

question: Can I sell clothing on eBay Live?
expected_answer_hint: No — clothing is not a supported category currently

question: What internet speed do I need to go live as a seller?
expected_answer_hint: 20+ Mbps upload speed

question: What equipment do I need to host an eBay Live event?
expected_answer_hint: Camera or smartphone

question: What fees do sellers pay on eBay Live?
expected_answer_hint: Standard eBay final value fees — typically 12.9% to 15% of total sale plus $0.30 per order

question: Does eBay Live have a mobile app?
expected_answer_hint: Should say it doesn't know — not mentioned in known info

question: What is the revenue share for eBay Live influencers?
expected_answer_hint: Should say it doesn't know — not in public info

question: Can I schedule an eBay Live event in advance?
expected_answer_hint: Should say it doesn't know or refer user to help pages
